property.name: signText
property.value: Notice Board: Adventures Wanted — speak to the Ranger Captain.

property.name: signText
property.value: The Ranger Captain seeks hunters. Bring beast trophies for reward.

property.name: signText
property.value: The Grocer needs forage ingredients. Explore the wilds.

property.name: signText
property.value: The Guild Armorer requires iron ingots. Visit the forge.

property.name: signText
property.value: The twelve paths are complete. The Ranger Captain awaits your final report.
